data.summary_suggestion: Update webhook configuration and event subscriptions
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing webhook's configuration including URL, event types, and active status. Changes take effect immediately for new events.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity and description is missing entirely. Added 'permanently' to clarify irreversibility, explained the consequence (no more notifications), specified return value, and provided guidance about alternatives. data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a webhook by ID. Once deleted, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications. Returns a success response confirming deletion. This action cannot be undone - consider disabling the webhook instead if you may need it later.
